suggestions: Ensure Section 7 has numbered functional steps for every runnable
Verify port naming conventions (PP_/RP_) and add physical units to all ranges
coverage_gaps: REQ-EPS-012 (Torque limit enforcement): Section 7.3.1 does not include any steps that handle torque limit enforcement functionality.
REQ-EPS-049 (Yaw rate handling): No runnable handles the yaw rate in a way that ensures accurate vehicle stability control.
REQ-EPS-050 (Ignition status handling): The RE_HandleModeChange runnable does not properly handle all aspects of ignition status changes.
REQ-EPS-051 (Motor temperature handling): The RE_ControlTorque runnable does not include any steps to handle motor temperature variations affecting performance.
REQ-EPS-052 (Vehicle speed handling): The RE_ControlTorque runnable does not include any steps to handle vehicle speed variations for optimal assist level calculation.
